programme.title: Ep. 3

programme.desc: ... League. - Entrambe reduci dalle sconfitte contro Liverpool e West Ham. Il Nottingham non vince sul campo dell'Arsenal dal 1989, da allora 4 pareggi e 10 sconfitte. TC: Massimo Marianella

programme.title: Marchegiani
programme.desc: Reload

programme.title: La Giovane Italia 2026 Ep.17 18/06/2026
programme.desc: ... 18/06/2026 La giovane Italia. - Servizi informativi dedicati ai piu' piccoli sportivi italiani e alle realta' giovanili legate al calcio, tra trofei, incontri, e storie.

programme.title: Tutti i gol di Del Piero in Champions
programme.desc: Una compilation di gol indimenticabili: riviviamo insieme le 42 reti che la bandiera della Juventus Alessandro Del Piero ha segnato in Champions League nel corso della sua carriera.

programme.title: Calciomercato - L'originale
programme.desc: Curiosita', commenti, notizie e anticipazioni sui possibili movimenti del calciomercato. Condotto dal trio Alessandro Bonan, Gianluca Di Marzio e Fayna.

programme.title: Lo sbarco del fenomeno: Ronnie e l'Inter
George Best
programme.desc: ... Storie di campioni. - Un appassionante viaggio nella storia del campione nordirlandese, nella citta' dove tutto ha avuto inizio: Belfast. Perche' "Maradona good, Pele' better, George... Best!".

programme.title: Borussia Dortmund - Real Madrid
programme.desc: ... Champions League. - Tedeschi alla terza finale di UCL: una vinta nel 1997 e una persa nel 2013. Real alla sesta in 11 stagioni con 5 vittorie. Ha vinto gli ultimi 2 precedenti. TC: Zancan-Marchegiani.

programme.title: Real Madrid - Atletico M. 2014
programme.desc: ... Madrid UEFA Champions League Story. - Per la prima volta nella storia della Champions la finale e' un derby. A Lisbona si affrontano Real e Atletico, con la squadra di Ancelotti che sogna di alzare "la decima".

programme.title: La Coppa dei Campioni
programme.desc: ... #SkyBuffaRacconta Storie di Champions. - Il pretesto, la nascita del format e tutti i retroscena che nel 1956 portarono a disputare la prima finale di Coppa dei Campioni, ora Champions League.

programme.title: Liverpool - Real Madrid 28/05/22
programme.desc: ... Champions League. - Ultima finale dei Reds nel 2019, 2-0 sul Tottenham. Ultima del Real nel 2018, 3-1 sul Liverpool. Quinta finale di Champions per Ancelotti. Quarta per Klopp. TC: Marianella-Marchegiani.

programme.title: Review Of The Season
programme.desc: ... League Magazine. - L'attenzione e' rivolta alla finale tra Paris Saint Germain e Arsenal, giocata alla Puskas Arena di Budapest. Un'occasione per rivivere momenti salienti, interviste esclusive ai protagonisti e retroscena della massima competizione europea.

programme.title: Juventus - Barcellona 24/05/15
programme.desc: ... UEFA Champions League Story. - Dopo 12 anni, la Juventus torna in finale di Champions League. A Berlino, l'avversario della squadra di Allegri e' il Barcellona di Leo Messi.

programme.title: Ep. 4
programme.desc: Riviviamo il trionfo in Champions League di Ferguson e Ronaldo nella finale inglese terminata ai rigori tra United e Chelsea e la vittoria della "decima" del Real di Ancelotti nel derby di Madrid.

programme.title: Milan - Ajax 1969
programme.desc: ... Champions League Story. - Riviviamo i momenti piu' esaltanti di questa competizione attraverso le partite piu' interessanti. Buon divertimento!

programme.title: Ep. 2
programme.desc: I momenti che hanno reso unica la Champions League raccontati da chi l'ha vinta: in questo episodio i protagonisti di Bayern Monaco, Ajax e Juventus.

programme.title: La rovesciata di Rooney
programme.desc: Il 12 febbraio 2011 Wayne Rooney segna in rovesciata per lo United il gol piu' iconico dei derby di Manchester. Riviviamo le emozioni di un momento che restera' nella storia della Premier.

programme.title: La Giovane Italia 2026 Ep.17 18/06/2026

programme.title: Cagliari - Inter (diretta)
programme.desc: Sardi reduci da 2 vittorie di fila (Parma e Lecce). Un solo successo a Cagliari nelle ultime 10 sfide con l'Inter. I nerazzurri vengono dal 2-1 sul Sassuolo. TC: Compagnoni-Gobbi

programme.title: Liverpool - Arsenal
programme.desc: Reds reduci dal successo esterno contro il Newcastle (2-3). L'Arsenal viene dal 5-0 sul Leeds. Ad Anfield non vince in Premier da 13 anni, 5 pareggi e 7 ko. TC: Massimo Marianella

programme.title: Bayern M. - Inter 2010
programme.desc: ... UEFA Champions League Story. - 22 Maggio 2010, al Santiago Bernabeu di Madrid, Inter e Bayern Monaco si sfidano nella finale di Champions League. Per i nerazzurri sara' il terzo titolo della storia

U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2013
programme.desc: A chance to relive the 2013 US Open at Merion Golf Club in Ardmore, Pennsylvania. America's Webb Simpson claimed a narrow one-stroke victory the previous year.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2014
programme.desc: The story of the 2014 US Open Championship at the No. 2 Course of the Pinehurst Resort in North Carolina. England's Justin Rose came into this event as the defending champion.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2015
programme.desc: The official film of the 2015 US Open, one of golf's four majors. Martin Kaymer went in as the defending champion from 2014.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2016
programme.desc: The official film of the 2016 US Open. Hosted at Oakmont Country Club in Pennsylvania, one of the world's most difficult courses, Jordan Spieth came in as the defending champion.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2017
programme.desc: The official film of the 2017 US Open. Hosted at Erin Hills in Wisconsin, Dustin Johnson came into the tournament as the defending champion from the previous year.

programme.title: Rose Ladies Series Golf
programme.desc: Comprising five one-day warm-up tournaments across England for stars of the LET, the 2026 edition of the Rose Ladies Series concluded at North Hants Golf Club.

programme.title: HotelPlanner Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the Interwetten Open during the 2026 season of the HotelPlanner Tour, the second tier of men's professional golf in Europe.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Highlights
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the Principal Charity Classic - a PGA Tour Champions event held at the Wakonda Club. Spain's Miguel Angel Jiménez conquered the rest a year ago.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2017
programme.desc: The official film of the 2017 US Open. Hosted at Erin Hills in Wisconsin, Dustin Johnson came into the tournament as the defending champion from the previous year.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2018
programme.desc: The official film of the 2018 US Open, held at Shinnecock Hills Golf Course. On an exceptionally challenging course, Brooks Koepka was aiming to retain his title from 2017.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2019
programme.desc: The official film of the 2019 US Open from the iconic Pebble Beach Golf Links. It was to be a memorable tournament on the California coast for a first-time Major winner.

programme.title: McGinley & Chamblee At The US Open
programme.desc: Join Paul McGinley and Brandel Chamblee as they preview the action ahead of the 126th edition of the US Open Championship at Shinnecock Hills.

programme.title: Live US Open Golf Round 1
programme.desc: The opening round of the 126th US Open Championship at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club. JJ Spaun snatched Major glory last year with a two-shot win over Scotland's Robert MacIntyre.

programme.title: Rose Ladies Series Golf
programme.desc: Comprising five one-day warm-up tournaments across England for stars of the LET, the 2026 edition of the Rose Ladies Series concluded at North Hants Golf Club.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2021
programme.desc: The official film of the 2021 US Open from the coastal course of Torrey Pines, setting the stage for Jon Rahm to ride a wave of victory in the Golden State of California.

programme.title: US Open Golf R1 Highlights
programme.desc: The opening round of the 126th US Open Championship at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club. JJ Spaun snatched Major glory last year with a two-shot win over Scotland's Robert MacIntyre. (18.06)

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2022
programme.desc: The official film of the 2022 US Open - the year England's Matt Fitzpatrick completed a nine-year journey, becoming only the second man to win a US Amateur and US Open on the same course.

programme.title: US Open Golf R1 Highlights
programme.desc: The opening round of the 126th US Open Championship at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club. JJ Spaun snatched Major glory last year with a two-shot win over Scotland's Robert MacIntyre. (18.06)

programme.title: Golf Academy
programme.desc: Some of golf's top professionals share their tips and advice for improving your game, from new starters to scratch golfers. Here, superstar Rory McIlroy is on hand with some advice. Part 1.

programme.title: US Open Golf R1 Highlights
programme.desc: The opening round of the 126th US Open Championship at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club. JJ Spaun snatched Major glory last year with a two-shot win over Scotland's Robert MacIntyre. (18.06)

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Films
programme.desc: The official film of the 2025 US Open. Battling through the toughest of Oakmont challenges, JJ Spaun became one of the most unlikely Major winners in recent memory.

programme.title: Live R&A Men's Amateur C'ship
programme.desc: As the 131st Amateur Championship reaches its conclusion at Royal Liverpool, join coverage of the penultimate day. Ethan Fang of the United States clinched victory in last year's finale.

programme.title: Live US Open Golf Round 2
programme.desc: The second round of the 126th US Open Championship at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club. JJ Spaun snatched Major glory last year with a two-shot win over Scotland's Robert MacIntyre. (19.06)

programme.title: SNF: Everton v Chelsea Hlts

programme.title: SNF: Leeds v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: On Saturday Night Football at Elland Road, Leeds United - three points above the Premier League's drop zone - play host to a Keith Andrews Brentford side dreaming of Europe. (21.03)

programme.title: PL: Newcastle v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: A St James' Park Tyne-Wear derby on Super Sunday sees local rivals Newcastle and Sunderland collide in the Premier League. The two teams are separated by just two points. (22.03)

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Climbing out of the bottom three for the first time since December last weekend, can West Ham pull clear again as Nuno Espirito Santo's men visit Villa on Super Sunday? (22.03)

programme.title: PL: Spurs v Nott'm Forest Hlts
programme.desc: On a huge afternoon at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, a desperate Spurs take on relegation rivals Nottingham Forest in the Premier League on Super Sunday. (22.03)

programme.title: FNF: West Ham v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: A point from safety, Nuno Espirito Santo's West Ham welcome bottom-of-the-table Wolves to the London Stadium. Rob Edwards' visitors have won two of their last three. (10.04)

programme.title: PL: Brentford v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Seventh meets eighth in the race for Europe as Brentford - held to three consecutive Premier League draws - entertain David Moyes' Everton at the Gtech Community Stadium. (11.04)

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: Fabian Hurzeler's Brighton, who prior to the international break collected back-to-back wins, resume their bid for European football next season with a trip to Burnley's Turf Moor. (11.04)

programme.title: PL: C. Palace v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: Crystal Palace and Newcastle meet at Selhurst Park on Super Sunday. Three Premier League points separates the hosts from the Magpies, with Palace also holding a game in hand. (12.04)

programme.title: PL: Nott'm Forest v A. Villa Hlts
programme.desc: With both sides picking up much-needed wins before the break, Nottingham Forest's fight for survival resumes against an Aston Villa side chasing Champions League qualification. (12.04)

programme.title: SNF: Liverpool v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: With one route back into the Champions League virtually closed midweek, can Arne Slot's Liverpool prise open another as they host Fulham in their bid to secure a top-five finish? (11.04)

programme.title: PL: Sunderland v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: The Roberto De Zerbi era begins for Tottenham Hotspur. With games running out, Spurs are desperately chasing a result away to Regis Le Bris' European outsiders Sunderland. (12.04)

programme.title: PL: Chelsea v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: The Carabao Cup winners Manchester City, who booked another trip to Wembley last weekend, go to Chelsea on Super Sunday bidding to keep touch with Premier League leaders Arsenal. (12.04)

programme.title: MNF: Man Utd v Leeds Utd Hlts
programme.desc: One of England's most famous rivalries is renewed on Monday Night Football as Michael Carrick's Champions League-chasing Manchester United host FA Cup semi-finalists Leeds. (13.04)

programme.title: PL: Newcastle v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Newcastle and Everton, both coming from Premier League defeat at the hands of Manchester opposition, enter this St James' Park contest separated by just one point. (28.02)

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Missing the chance to move into the top six last weekend, can Brentford bounce back on the road as Keith Andrews' Bees head to relegation-threatened Burnley? (28.02)

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Snatching victory late on at the City Ground, the Reds target a stronger showing as Arne Slot's Liverpool welcome a West Ham side fighting for their Premier League future. (28.02)

programme.title: SNF: Leeds v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: Manchester City head to Leeds on Saturday Night Football with a five-point gap to close to leaders Arsenal. The hosts are unbeaten in their last three Premier League contests. (28.02)

programme.title: PL: Brighton v Nott'm Forest Hlts
programme.desc: Brighton play host to Nottingham Forest at the Amex Stadium in the Premier League. (01.03)

programme.title: PL: Fulham v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: Interim Spurs boss Igor Tudor oversees his second London derby in as many weeks as Tottenham Hotspur visit Fulham for a Super Sunday clash at Craven Cottage in the Premier League. (01.03)

programme.title: PL: Man Utd v Crystal Palace Hlts
programme.desc: A Manchester United side transformed under Michael Carrick bid to gain more ground in the top-four race as Crystal Palace come to Old Trafford for this Premier League match-up. (01.03)

programme.title: PL: Arsenal v Chelsea Hlts
programme.desc: Following last weekend's statement win, Premier League leaders Arsenal go up against another London rival in the form of Liam Rosenior's top-four chasing Chelsea on Super Sunday. (01.03)

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Bournemouth
programme.desc: Nine Premier League games unbeaten, Andoni Iraola's Bournemouth pay a visit to 19th-placed Burnley. The in-form Cherries are still in the mix for European football next season. (14.03)

programme.title: PL: Sunderland v Brighton
programme.desc: Sunderland and Brighton - separated by three Premier League points - compete at the Stadium of Light. At the back end of last year, the two teams played out a stalemate at the Amex. (14.03)

programme.title: SNF: Arsenal v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Seven clear at the top, Mikel Arteta's Premier League leaders Arsenal entertain David Moyes' European hopefuls Everton on Saturday Night Football at the Emirates Stadium. (14.03)

programme.title: SNF: Chelsea v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: Chelsea return to the Bridge after laying down a marker at Villa in the race for the Champions League spots, as Liam Rosenior's side meet Newcastle next on Saturday Night Football. (14.03)

programme.title: PL: Nott'm Forest v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: After holding City to a draw, Forest eye a big win against Fulham here in their bid to survive the drop. The Cottagers lost to Forest's relegation rivals West Ham previously. (15.03)

programme.title: PL: Crystal Palace v Leeds Hlts
programme.desc: Leeds' search for a first win in four takes them to Selhurst Park on Super Sunday for a Premier League meeting with the departing Oliver Glasner's Crystal Palace outfit. (15.03)

programme.title: PL: Man Utd v Aston Villa Hlts
programme.desc: Top-five rivals Manchester United and Aston Villa meet at Old Trafford on Super Sunday. Both sides come from damaging defeats in their respective bids for European football. (15.03)

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: Amid troubling times for Spurs, a trip to Anfield beckons as the champions Liverpool - experiencing their own drop in performances - host the north Londoners on Super Sunday. (15.03)
